stages.concept:
# Unit 070: 목적격 보어로 쓰이는 원형부정사 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **목적격 보어로 쓰이는 원형부정사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I saw her **cross** the street.
> 나는 그녀가 길을 건너는 것을 보았다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 원형부정사는 **to 없이 동사원형만** 쓰는 것이에요. **사역동사**와 **지각동사** 뒤에서 목적격 보어로 쓰여요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **사역동사 (make, let, have)** + 목적어 + 동사원형 — ~가 …하게 하다

> My mom **made** me **clean** my room.
> 엄마가 나에게 내 방을 청소하게 했다.

> She **let** me **use** her computer.
> 그녀는 나에게 그녀의 컴퓨터를 사용하게 해주었다.

> He **had** his son **wash** the car.
> 그는 아들에게 차를 씻게 했다.

**Q. 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"My mom made me (       ) my room."
1. clean ✅
2. cleaning
3. to clean

👩‍🏫 선생님: **지각동사 (see, watch, hear, feel, notice)** + 목적어 + 동사원형 — ~가 …하는 것을 보다/듣다/느끼다

> I **saw** him **enter** the building.
> 나는 그가 건물에 들어가는 것을 보았다.

> She **heard** someone **knock** on the door.
> 그녀는 누군가 문을 두드리는 것을 들었다.

> I **felt** the ground **shake**.
> 나는 땅이 흔들리는 것을 느꼈다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 지각동사 뒤에 **-ing**를 쓰면 진행 중인 동작을 강조해요.

> I saw him **entering** the building. (들어가고 있는 중)

🧑‍🎓 학생: 사역동사(make/let/have)와 지각동사(see/hear/feel 등) 뒤에는 to 없이 동사원형! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 070: 목적격 보어로 쓰이는 원형부정사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He made me (     ) for the test.
> **정답** practice

---

**02.** I saw her ? the street.
> **정답** cross

---

**03.** She let me ? her computer.
> **정답** use

---

**04.** We heard him ? a song.
> **정답** sing

---

**05.** My mom made me ? my room.
> **정답** clean

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She made me to wash the dishes.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to wash → wash

---

**07.** I saw him to run in the park.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to run → run

---

**08.** She let me to borrow her pen.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to borrow → borrow

---

**09.** We heard her to cry in the room.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to cry → cry

---

**10.** He made me to wait for an hour.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to wait → wait

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
엄마가 나에게 설거지를 시켰다.
My mom made me the dishes.
> **정답** wash

---

**12.** 나는 그녀가 노래하는 것을 들었다.
I heard her a song.
> **정답** sing

---

**13.** 선생님이 우리를 일찍 가게 해 주셨다.
The teacher let us early.
> **정답** leave (go)

---

**14.** 나는 그가 공원에서 뛰는 것을 보았다.
I saw him in the park.
> **정답** run

---

**15.** 그녀는 나에게 책을 읽게 시켰다.
She made me the book.
> **정답** read

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
엄마가 나에게 방을 청소하게 시켰다.
made My mom me clean my room
> **정답** My / mom / made / me / clean / my / room

---

**17.** 나는 그가 기타를 치는 것을 들었다.
heard I him play the guitar
> **정답** I / heard / him / play / the / guitar

---

**18.** 선생님이 우리를 쉬게 해 주셨다.
The teacher us let rest
> **정답** The / teacher / let / us / rest

---

**19.** 나는 그녀가 울고 있는 것을 보았다.
saw I her cry
> **정답** I / saw / her / cry

---

**20.** 그는 나에게 한 시간 동안 기다리게 했다.
made He me wait for an hour
> **정답** He / made / me / wait / for / an / hour
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 070: 목적격 보어로 쓰이는 원형부정사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
My mom had me ________________ my room.
My dad let me ____________ his tablet PC.
clean - use
to clean - use
clean - to use
to clean - to use
> **정답** clean - use

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I saw a boy ______________ at my sister.
So, I quickly ran to him and made him
_________________.
to shout - to stop
to shout - stopping
shouting - to stop
shout - stop
• yell 소리지르다
> **정답** shout - stop

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom heard his mom ______________ him on the
porch.
He went to her and helped her _____________ heavy
boxes.
to call - carry
call - carry
call - carrying
to call - to carry
> **정답** call - carry

---

**04.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The teacher had me to write
my name on the top.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to write → write

---

**05.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
My parents let me to invite
my friends to my birthday
party.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to invite → invite

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하게 빈 칸에 주어진 단어의 알맞은 형태를
쓰시오.
나는 소년이 거리에서 춤 추는 것을 보았다. [see, dance]
I a boy on the street.
> **정답** saw, dance (dancing)

---

**07.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Mom had me finish English homework first.
Amy helped her little sister solves difficult
math questions.
Tom made his daughter carrying her bag on her
own.
She let her son attend the party in black suit.
> **정답** Tom made his daughter carrying her bag on her own., Amy helped her little sister solves difficult math questions.

---

**08.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
They heard the famous businessman make a
speech.
Amy saw the man eat with his hand.
Tom felt an insect to land on his shoulder.
Mom smelled the food burnt in the oven.
• land (땅표면에) 내려앉다, 착륙하다
> **정답** Mom smelled the food burnt in the oven., Tom felt an insect to land on his shoulder.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
경찰은 그에게 진실만을 말하도록 시켰다.
The police had him to tell the truth only.
The police had him tell the truth only.
The police had him telling the truth only.
The police had him tells the truth only.
> **정답** The police had him tell the truth only.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 낯선 사람이 그 빌딩에 들어가는 것을 보았다.
Amy saw a stranger enters the building.
Amy saw a stranger enter the building.
Amy saw a stranger to enter the building.
Amy saw a stranger entered the building.
> **정답** Amy saw a stranger enter the building.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 Tom이 잠시동안 나를 보는 것을 느낄 수 있었다.
I could feel Tom looks at me for a while.
I could feel Tom look at me for a while.
I could feel Tom to look at me for a while.
I could feel Tom looked at me for a while.
> **정답** I could feel Tom look at me for a while.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy heard someone sing a beautiful song.
Tom had his brother help him with his
homework.
My mom made me put out the garbage.
Jake felt his hands to shake with anger.
> **정답** Jake felt his hands to shake with anger.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He made his sister run errands for him.
The teacher let the students have some free
time.
She felt something touches her hand.
Amy often watches her play the piano.
• errand 심부름
> **정답** She felt something touches her hand.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
He made the workers to quit.
They help them ordering delicious dishes.
My mom had the repair man coming at 4
o'clock.
I let her use my laptop for a day.
> **정답** I let her use my laptop for a day.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom saw his dad plays golf on the field.
Amy watched them to follow her.
The man listens to her to singing every night.
I felt someone grab my wallet in my pocket.
• grab 붙잡다
> **정답** I felt someone grab my wallet in my pocket.

---

**16.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
The boss let the workers to
take a day off tomorrow.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to take → take

---

**17.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
My family watched me sang on
the stage..
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** sang → sing

---

**18.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
Ms. Miller had her dog playing
in her garden.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** playing → play

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
One day, I saw a stranger enter the closed
store, and then I heard him breaking
something. I hurriedly had my kid
to call the police. When the police
arrived, they asked me answering some
questions. At last, the stranger was caught by the
police.
> **정답** enter, breaking, call, to answer

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
I hear my brother to play the piano. I
usually like his play, but it isn't very pleasant
today. I have a test tomorrow, and I have to study.
So I had him stop playing the piano. Instead, I
ask him listens to music
with earphones.
> **정답** play, stop, to listen to
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 070 목적격 보어로 쓰이는 원형부정사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 아이를 자신의 무릎에 앉도록 허락해 줬다. [let, sit]
He  (     )  the kid  (     )  on his lap.
정답 let, sit

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Jane은 누군가가 자신의 등을 만진다는 걸 느꼈다. [feel,
touch]
Jane  (     )  somebody  (     )  her hair.
정답 felt, touch (touching)

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
정혜는 엄마가 쿠키를 굽는 냄새를 맡았다. [smell, bake]
Junghye  (     )  her mother  (     )  cookies.
정답 smelled, bake (baking)

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
우리가 자기 전에 엄마는 내게 문을 잠그도록 했다.
힌트 (     ) me, the door, had, lock
Mom  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  before
we go to bed.
정답 had, me, lock, the, door

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
나는 지난 밤 그들이 싸우는 것을 들었다.
힌트 (     ) them, fight, heard
I  (     )   (     )   (     )  last night.
정답 heard, them, fight

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
선생님은 수업 중에 학생들이 조용하도록 만들었다.
힌트 (     ) made, quiet, be, the students
The teacher  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in
class.
정답 made, the, students, be, quiet

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) a man, steal
A: Did you see anything?
B: Yes, I saw  (     )   (     )   (     )  something from
the store.
정답 a, man, steal (stealing)

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) stay, home, study, English
A: What did your parents make you do on the
weekend?
B: They made me  (     )   (     )  and  (     )   (     ) .
정답 stay, home, study, English

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) call, order, delivery
A: Did James have you cook his lunch?
B: No, he had me  (     )  and  (     )   (     ) .
정답 call, order, delivery

---

**10.** 주어진 동사를 활용하여 글을 완성하시오.
buy / carry / count
I went shopping with my mom. My mom had me try a
lot of clothes and shoes. I chose the yellow sandals
but mom made me  (     )  running shoes. When we
checked out, we paid with cash. I saw the clerk
 bills. After that, mom had me  (     )  shoes
home.
정답 buy, count (counting), carry

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 070: 목적격 보어로 쓰이는 원형부정사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My dad had me ________________ my desk.
My mom let me ____________ her phone. clean - use to clean - use clean - to use to clean - to use
> 정답: clean - use

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I saw a boy ______________ at my brother.
So, I quickly ran to him and made him _________________.
to shout - to stop to shout - stopping shouting - to stop shout - stop
> 정답: shout - stop

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom heard his dad ______________ him in the yard.
He went to him and helped him _____________ heavy boxes.
to call - carry call - carry call - carrying to call - to carry
> 정답: call - carry

---

**04.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  coach  had  me  to  run around  the  field. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: to run → run

---

**05.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. My  parents  let  me  to  invite my  friends  to  my  birthday party. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: to invite → invite

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하게 빈 칸에 주어진 단어의 알맞은 형태를 쓰시오.
나는 소녀가 공원에서 노래하는 것을 보았다. [see, sing] I a girl in the park.
> 정답: saw, sing (singing)

---

**07.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Mom had me finish my math homework first.
Amy helped her little brother solves difficult puzzles.
Tom made his son carrying his bag on his own.
She let her daughter attend the camp in sports clothes.
> 정답: Tom made his son carrying his bag on his own., Amy helped her little sister solves difficult math questions.

---

**08.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
They heard the famous singer make a speech.
Amy saw the boy eat with his hands.
Tom felt a bug to land on his arm.
Mom smelled the bread burnt in the oven.
> 정답: Mom smelled the bread burnt in the oven., Tom felt

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
선생님은 그에게 사실만을 말하도록 시켰다.
The teacher had him to tell the truth only.
The teacher had him tell the truth only.
The teacher had him telling the truth only.
The teacher had him tells the truth only.
> 정답: The teacher had him tell the truth only.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 낯선 사람이 그 건물에 들어가는 것을 보았다.
Amy saw a stranger enters the building.
Amy saw a stranger enter the building.
Amy saw a stranger to enter the building.
Amy saw a stranger entered the building.
> 정답: Amy saw a stranger enter the building.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 Amy가 잠시동안 나를 보는 것을 느낄 수 있었다.
I could feel Amy looks at me for a while.
I could feel Amy look at me for a while.
I could feel Amy to look at me for a while.
I could feel Amy looked at me for a while.
> 정답: I could feel Amy look at me for a while.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy heard someone sing a beautiful song.
Tom had his sister help him with his project.
My dad made me take out the garbage.
Jake felt his hands to shake with anger.
> 정답: Jake felt his hands to shake with anger.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He made his brother run errands for him.
The coach let the players have some rest time.
She felt something touches her arm.
Amy often watches him play the drums.
> 정답: She felt something touches her arm.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
He made the members to quit.
